comments.body: CI evidence for the make-pass criterion: (1) make lint -> 'All checks passed!' (ruff check + format). (2) make typecheck -> 'Success: no issues found in 312 source files' (mypy). (3) tests green: tests/unit/test_audit_coaching_fidelity.py 3 passed, plus 111 passed across plan/code sidecar suites (test_audit_plan_review_v2, test_sidecar_enrichment, test_sidecar_reader, test_plan_review). (4) Gerrit change 698 (cumbersome-indicolite-larva) carries Verified=+1 (CI: build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions in a clean env) AND LLM-Review=+1. All three make targets pass locally and in clean CI.

compiled_state.description:
## Why

The epic's Success Criteria require the `REVIEW_RESULT` sidecar to capture the FULL four-pass
record, including **pass-4 coaching**. Stories 4e19 (plan) and 7c84 (code) enriched the per-finding
buckets but NEITHER touched the separate `coaching[]` array. The plan-review sidecar's `_slim`
(`src/rebar/llm/plan_review/sidecar.py`, the `"coaching"` block) persists each coaching note as only
`{move_id, finding_refs}` — it DROPS `move_name`, `subject`, and the rendered `coaching` prose. The
full verdict coaching shape (per `plan_review_verdict.schema.json`) is `{move_id, move_name, subject,
finding_refs[], coaching}`. Because the LLM-chosen `subject` and the rendered prose are not
persisted, a downstream audit UI cannot reconstruct or re-render the coaching note — it has only a
move id and finding refs. This defeats the epic's "lossless capture" goal for pass-4.

## What

Persist pass-4 coaching **losslessly** in the plan-review sidecar (`plan_review_result_v2`): store
the full coaching record `{move_id, move_name, subject, finding_refs, coaching}` instead of the
2-field slim. Confirm the code-review sidecar (`code_review_result_v2`) already persists coaching
losslessly (`build_payload` stores `verdict.get("coaching", [])` verbatim) and lock that in with a
regression test.

## Scope

- `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/sidecar.py` — in `build_payload`, change the `"coaching"` block to
  persist the full record per note: `{"move_id": c.get("move_id"), "move_name": c.get("move_name"),
  "subject": c.get("subject"), "finding_refs": c.get("finding_refs", []), "coaching":
  c.get("coaching")}` (keep it schema-tolerant — a note missing a field yields None, never
  KeyError). This is additive to the existing `plan_review_result_v2` payload (no schema bump); the
  reader is unchanged.
- `src/rebar/llm/code_review/sidecar.py` — NO code change (it already stores the full coaching
  array); add a regression test asserting the code-review sidecar payload's `coaching` carries the
  full record shape, so the lossless property cannot silently regress.

## Approach rationale

Pass-4 coaching is a separate `coaching[]` array (not per-finding), so it was outside 4e19/7c84's
per-finding enrichment. The fix is a minimal widening of the plan-review `_slim` coaching projection
to the full verdict shape — the same "stop dropping fields" pattern 4e19 applied to per-finding
evidence/scenarios. No schema version bump is needed (v2 already; the coaching array just gains
fields). Code-review already persists the full array, so it only needs a regression lock.

## Compatibility & rollback

Purely additive to the plan-review sidecar payload — existing readers ignore the extra coaching
fields; older `v1`/slim records stay readable. Reverting restores the 2-field slim with no migration.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The plan-review sidecar payload persists each pass-4 coaching note with its full shape —
      `move_id`, `move_name`, `subject`, `finding_refs`, and the rendered `coaching` prose — not just
      `{move_id, finding_refs}`. Oracle: a unit test driving `build_payload` with a verdict whose
      `coaching[]` carries the full shape and asserting all five fields survive in the emitted
      payload.
- [ ] The code-review sidecar payload persists pass-4 coaching losslessly (full record shape).
      Oracle: a unit test driving `build_payload` with a full-shape coaching note and asserting the
      fields survive.
- [ ] `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass.

file_impact.reason: widen _slim coaching projection to full shape
regression test lock for lossless coaching

compiled_state.title: pass-4 coaching lossless persistence (plan + code sidecars)
